headlines.title: Hospital waited two days before raising alarm about meningitis outbreak
headlines.description: Experts say the wait was indefensible and possibly delayed identification of the outbreak.

headlines.title: Warning of global recession if oil price hits $150
headlines.description: Larry Fink says if oil prices stay high for a sustained period it will have "profound implications" for the world economy.

headlines.title: Two men arrested over Jewish charity ambulance arson attacks
headlines.description: Four Hatzola ambulances were set ablaze in Golders Green, London, in the early hours of Monday.

headlines.title: 'He liked the fear in our eyes,' Epstein survivors tell BBC
headlines.description: In an interview with BBC Newsnight, five women abused by the disgraced financier describe the impact of their shared ordeal.

headlines.title: 'Wildly unaffordable': The harsh reality of shared ownership
headlines.description: For many, the promise of getting a foot on the property ladder has turned into a nightmare.

headlines.title: 'It wasn't meant to end like this' - Salah exit tough but inevitable
headlines.description: Less than a year ago, Mohamed Salah was sitting on a throne inside Anfield after renewing his contract - so why is he leaving?

headlines.title: NHS dentistry is rotting. Will the plan to fix it work?
headlines.description: As patients struggle to find NHS dentists, Labour has a plan but not everybody is convinced it will work

headlines.title: Playful lynx snatches top prize in photo competition
headlines.description: A young lynx caught mid play has won the Wildlife Photographer of the Year People's Choice Award 2026.

headlines.title: First female Archbishop of Canterbury to be enthroned
headlines.description: The Prince and Princess of Wales will be part of the congregation at Canterbury Cathedral - alongside nurses and carers, reflecting the new archbishop's past career.

headlines.title: 'I hugged armed man to stop him bombing hospital'
headlines.description: Nathan Newby, who used kindness to persuade the "lone-wolf terrorist" to abandon his plan, is being awarded the George Medal.

headlines.title: Oil price falls as Trump talks up Iran peace negotiations
headlines.description: Tehran has rejected claims of talks, with one official questioning the US's diplomatic credibility.

headlines.title: Lyse Doucet: Small window open for US-Iran talks, but swift end to war still unlikely
headlines.description: President Trump says the US is already dealing with a "top person" in Iran, but Tehran denies that any talks have begun.

headlines.title: Prospect of US-Iran talks puts Netanyahu under pressure
headlines.description: US President Donald Trump has pointed to diplomatic talks to end the offensive - but Israel might not yet be ready to walk away.

headlines.title: What Iranians make of the possibility of talks to end the war
headlines.description: Some Iranians dismiss the possibility of talks to end the war, others worry a deal may leave the current leaders in place.

headlines.title: Everyday life in Asia is being upended by Iran war fuel crisis
headlines.description: Asia relies heavily on oil and gas from the Gulf, and shortages and higher prices are starting to bite.

headlines.title: Is there an election in my area?
headlines.description: Elections are taking place across the country in May. Use our postcode lookup to find out if there are elections where you live.

headlines.title: Has banning phones improved performance at Dutch schools?
headlines.description: Two years ago the Netherlands banned phones in schools. Now the government wants to go further, pushing to restrict social media for under‑16s.

headlines.title: 'Most difficult decision ever': Receipts Podcast hosts step down after 10 years
headlines.description: Audrey Indome and Tolly Shoneye have recorded almost 300 episodes of the hit podcast together since 2016.

headlines.title: How Manchester is giving UK music 'a new lease of life' again
headlines.description: Following on from the Brits, the city once dubbed Madchester hosts the MOBOs and 6 Music Festival.

headlines.title: The Papers: 'US troops gather in Gulf' and 'Strictly No Baftas'
headlines.description: Donald Trump plans to deploy US ground troops in the Gulf is a focus for Wednesday's front pages.

headlines.title: Families urged not to cuddle lambs after infection outbreak left dozens sick
headlines.description: Health officials say it is vital to remember that young farm animals can carry germs that cause illness.

headlines.title: Hundreds of UK teenagers to trial social media ban and digital curfews
headlines.description: The government will interview the young people and their parents before and after they try the limits to assess their impact.

headlines.title: Adolescence star Owen Cooper takes two RTS Awards
headlines.description: Owen Cooper wins double for his standout performance in the Netflix drama show.

headlines.title: BTS comeback concert on Netflix draws 18.4m global viewers
headlines.description: The livestreamed show saw the band perform together for the first time since October 2022.

headlines.title: Danish PM fails to secure majority in party's weakest election showing since 1903
headlines.description: The party, which has been in power since 2019, gained the most votes but faces tough talks on forming a new government.

headlines.title: Democrats flip Florida state seat that includes Trump's Mar-a-Lago home
headlines.description: Emily Gregory’s projected victory comes in a legislative district which a Republican candidate won by 19 percentage points in 2024.

headlines.title: Journalists at Australia's national broadcaster strike for first time in 20 years
headlines.description: Staff have walked out for 24 hours over a pay rise offer that was below inflation.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Are US-Iran Talks Actually Happening?
headlines.description: What do we know about negotiations to de-escalate the Iran war?

headlines.title: Americanswers… on 5 Live! Trump claims Iran wants to "make a deal" to end the war
headlines.description: Iran denies talks with the US to stop the war as ‘fake news’

headlines.title: Is 'baby brain' real?
headlines.description: Baby brain is a concept many mums can relate to. But what’s really going on?

headlines.title: 'It wasn't meant to end like this' - Salah exit tough but inevitable
headlines.description: Less than a year ago, Mohamed Salah was sitting on a throne inside Anfield after renewing his contract - so why is he leaving?

headlines.title: £123 for a child's England kit - have prices gone too far?
headlines.description: BBC Sport explores the rise in the cost of kits for the 2026 World Cup, with insights from experts and fans.

headlines.title: Bompastor demands more respect for women after disallowed Chelsea goal
headlines.description: Chelsea manager Sonia Bompastor says the women's game needs "more respect" after her side have a goal controversially disallowed in their Women's Champions League quarter-final first leg against Arsenal.

headlines.title: Woods targets Masters after return to action in TGL
headlines.description: Tiger Woods says he is "trying to play" at next month's Masters after returning to action for the first time in more than a year in the TGL.

headlines.title: 'Kicked to the kerb' - is boxing failing its heroes?
headlines.description: Following the death of Ricky Hatton, families and former champions tell a new BBC documentary the sport has not filled the void in care for its fighters.

headlines.title: 'Away end' trial to include Leicester v Northampton derby
headlines.description: The Prem's trial of 'away ends' in top-flight rugby is to be given its biggest showcase yet at the East Midlands derby on 9 May.
